The '''Ugor Salvage Company''' was a waste recovery company<ref name="GG4-2" /> and [[starshipwright]]. The company was the manufacturer of the [[Black Hole-class Salvage Dreadnought|''Black Hole''-class Salvage Dreadnought]].<ref name="SH" />

==Appearances==
*[[Scavenger Hunt (adventure)|''Scavenger Hunt'']]
